metadata.title: DeutschPilot – Premium German Courses & Retreats
metadata.description: DeutschPilot is the premium learning platform for fast progress, real results, and new opportunities.

hero.title:
Learn German.
Your Path.
Your Future.
hero.subtitle: DeutschPilot is more than a course – it is your personal compass for rapid progress and real goals.

courses.title: Our German Courses
courses.subtitle: Find the course that fits you.

intensive.title: Super Intensive Courses
intensive.desc: Learn faster with maximum structure – online or on-site.

ai.title: AI Learning Companion
ai.desc: Your AI tutor helps you around the clock.

certificate.title: Certificate
certificate.desc: Receive a recognized certificate for your level.

retreats.title: Retreats
retreats.desc: Intensive learning in an inspiring environment.

maria.name: Maria L.
maria.text: The live sessions and community helped me tremendously. I now feel confident in everyday life and at work.

jonas.name: Jonas S.
jonas.text: Thanks to DeutschPilot, I reached my B1 level much faster than expected. The structure and teachers are simply top-notch!

aylin.name: Aylin K.
aylin.text: The super intensive retreat course was the best decision. Learning in this environment is unbeatable.

retreats.title: Intensive learning. Switch off. Recharge.
retreats.subtitle: Our language retreats combine intensive learning with relaxation, nature, and inspiring people.
